game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **EXIT – Die Prüfung des Greifen**: This single-player digital escape room game immerses players in a haunted castle, where they interact with static, hand-drawn scene illustrations by tapping on hotspots to examine objects, collect items, and uncover clues. Players manage an inventory of collected items, combining them by dragging one item onto another or using them on specific environmental elements to solve one of the twenty distinct, multi-layered puzzles. Progression is linear, with each successful puzzle solution unlocking new areas or revealing critical codes, and difficulty scales as puzzles require more complex multi-step deductions and item interactions. The core loop involves observing scenes, collecting information, and applying logical reasoning to solve each unique challenge, with the ultimate goal being to escape the castle by completing all twenty interconnected puzzles.
game_info.description: Escape from a haunted castle by solving 20 interconnected puzzles! Explore hand-drawn rooms, examine objects to find clues, collect items, and combine them to unlock new areas. Each puzzle builds on the last, requiring careful observation and logical deduction. Progress through the castle's mysterious chambers to find the final exit and your freedom.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between hotspots and menu options
Space: Examine/interact with highlighted hotspot or use selected item
Z: Open/close inventory menu
Shift: Select item in inventory (hold and press Arrow Keys to navigate, Space to confirm)
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/unpause game
R: Return to title screen

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic game mechanics including navigation between hotspots, examining objects, collecting items, opening inventory, and selecting items. Validates that the player can interact with the environment and manage inventory correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate through available hotspots using arrow keys, examine several objects to collect items, open the inventory menu, and select different items. Move between rooms when doors are unlocked.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully navigate hotspots, collect at least 3 items into inventory, open inventory menu, and select items without errors. Player position updates correctly and inventory reflects collected items.

TEST_1.expected: Successfully navigate hotspots, collect at least 3 items into inventory, open inventory menu, and select items without errors. Player position updates correctly and inventory reflects collected items.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the complete puzzle-solving sequence to win the game. This validates that all 20 puzzles can be solved in the correct order and the win condition is properly triggered.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Follow the optimal solution path: examine key objects in order, collect necessary items, combine items when needed, use items on correct environmental elements, and solve each puzzle to unlock progression to the next room until all 20 puzzles are completed.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully solve all 20 puzzles in sequence, unlock all areas, reach the final exit, and trigger GAME_OVER_WIN state. Game state should show puzzlesSolved = 20 and gamePhase = "GAME_OVER_WIN".
